perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a brown mesh top is inside a Costco store, holding a large plastic container of 'Fruitist' brand blueberries. She points at the label and talks to the camera. (2) The camera shows a close-up of the blueberries inside the container, highlighting their large size. There are quick cuts showing other boxes of blueberries and grapes on the store shelves. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where the same woman and another woman in a patterned bucket hat are sitting at a table. They are holding up individual blueberries to the camera to demonstrate their size. (4) Both women are seen eating the blueberries, gesturing with their hands, giving thumbs-up, and expressing positive reactions through facial expressions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. A female voice speaks in an excited and energetic tone in Mandarin Chinese. Background ambient noise of a busy retail store is audible, including distant voices and cart movements. (2) The audio transitions as the scene changes to a quieter home environment, though the BGM continues. Two female voices interact, discussing the product. Sounds of the plastic container opening and the crunching/chewing of the fruit are heard clearly. (3) The music maintains a consistent tempo throughout the video, ending with a final enthusiastic statement from the speakers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Functional Text: '好多人都在買' (Many people are buying) appears as a variety-show style caption. (3) Hook Text: '便宜大家都在買 最巨大的藍莓' (Cheap, everyone is buying, the biggest blueberries) shown with yellow lightning bolt stickers. (4) Functional Text: '510克 半公斤只要269' (510g, half a kilo for only 269) indicating price and weight. (5) Decorative Text: '完全咬得到' (Completely chewable) with blue stylized font. (6) Functional Text: '也是我們減肥人非常愛的水果聖品' (Also a fruit holy product for us weight-losers) highlighting health benefits.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping discovery at Costco -> Product details/pricing -> Home-based taste test and recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, multiple shoppers and staff members visible in the background of the Costco scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a black beret, a black camisole under a brown mesh long-sleeve shirt. The second woman wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco wholesale warehouse with industrial shelving, bulk food products, and shopping carts. Home interior with a dining table, plates, and a bird cage in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright supermarket lighting and natural indoor home lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Context -> Product Specs -> Personal Review/Validation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a consumer recommendation for a specific product available at Costco. By showing the scale of the blueberries compared to a face and providing a live tasting session with positive feedback, the creators aim to influence their audience to purchase the item while it's at a perceived bargain price.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed focus on the 'Fruitist' brand name, clear mention of the retailer (Costco), and a highly positive review of the product's value and taste.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of high-contrast yellow text boxes and 'variety show' style reactive captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical lifestyle 'hidden gem' discovery content that relies on social proof ('everyone is buying') to drive engagement.
